Anima V2: Anime AI Drawing Tool, Fast Character Illustrations All-in-One Pack
product_description:
Anima is a lightweight AI drawing model (text-to-image) specialized in anime-style content. It excels at anime concepts, characters, and styles, but can also produce various other non-photorealistic content. Designed for illustrations and artistic images.

Anima is like an "anime illustration expert" AI - fast generation, beautiful style, strong control. Perfect for anime and art creation enthusiasts, but not suitable for photorealistic results.

Anima V2, based on V1, adds the latest Turbo model for ultra-fast generation in just 8 steps; model switching between Base and Turbo; and Lora extension support.

Key Features

Anime Focus: Specializes in anime characters, scenes, and illustrations. Trained on millions of anime images plus ~800K other art images.
Not Photorealistic: Deliberately avoids photorealism, focusing on illustration and art styles.
Multiple Versions:
Base: Most flexible, diverse styles, suitable for advanced users training their own LoRA.
Aesthetic: Optimized for more consistent and beautiful output, ready to use.
Turbo: Ultra-fast generation (recommended for beginners), quality close to Aesthetic but slightly less diverse.

Easy to Use: Supports ComfyUI, resolution 512x512 to 1536x1536. Prompts support Danbooru tags or natural language, mixable.
Prompt Friendly: Supports quality tags (masterpiece, score_9), artist tags (@ prefix), safety tags, easy style and content control.

Applications

Anime Creation: Characters, fan art, original characters, scene illustrations.
Art Illustration: Non-photorealistic digital painting, concept art, stylized images.
Game/Visual Novel Development: Character sprites, backgrounds, concept art.
Quick Iteration: Turbo mode for rapid prompt testing.
LoRA Training: Base version for training custom style or character models.

Usage:

computer_specs.cpu: Intel i5 / AMD Ryzen 5 or equivalent
